# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Performance and pipeline improvements**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 delivers allocation-free hot paths in HarfBuzzSharp and SKColor, plus upstream Skia m151 bug fixes. This release focuses on managed-layer performance: zero-allocation UTF-8 encoding in HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer, pooled char arrays in tag parsing, zero-copy shaper glyph spans, and a ReadOnlySpan<char> SKColor hex parser. It also merges two rounds of upstream Skia m151 fixes.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Upstream Skia m151 bug-fix merges** — Two rounds of upstream chrome/m151 fixes were merged, bringing stability and rendering improvements from the Skia team. ([#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382))

## API Surface

- **SKColor hex parsing gains ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads** — SKColor.Parse and TryParse now accept ReadOnlySpan<char>, avoiding string allocations when parsing hex color strings from sliced input. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **GRContextOptions unsafe modifier removed** — The unnecessary unsafe modifier has been removed from GRContextOptions, reducing noise for consumers building with -warnaserror. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Bug Fixes

- **HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8(string) is now allocation-free** — The per-call UTF-8 encoding previously allocated a temporary byte array on every call. It now uses a pooled ArrayPool<byte> buffer, eliminating allocations on hot text-shaping paths. ([#4376](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4376))
- **Tag parsing no longer allocates a char[4] per call** — HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse and SKFourByteTag.Parse previously allocated a small char array on every parse. Both now use stack-allocated spans. ([#4408](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4408), [#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396))
- **SKShaper glyph results read via zero-copy spans** — The SKShaper result retrieval path previously copied glyph data into managed arrays. It now uses Span-based reads directly over the native buffer. ([#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388))
